picks.quote: Manuel Torres to upset the local the hometown guy Raphael Phys. I think he's going to lose to Manuel Torres by finish.
I think Char Bullet should go out and look really good here against past his expiration date, Michelle Pereira.
I think Yakov is too wellrounded... I think Yakov should win by finish.
I'm confident he wins by KO. KO sits at minus 160. I think John Jenko should win by knockout.
McCall Ole Jchuk at minus 115. He should be able to win. I really think we're looking at um Avis Momedov kind of in a similar spot to Michelle Pereira, he's falling off
I like Beexat's chances a lot here. I think that his hands are a lot sharper than Gene Matsumoto.
I like Nolan as a dog. He's a plus 150 underdog... I think Eric Nolan is live to surprise the 5-0 prospect.
I'm going Bruno Ferrer. I think he's live to get a knockout. It's plus 550 for the KO.
Nazim Sadikov to win by KO over one and a half rounds is plus 550. I do think he's live for a later stage finish.
